response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD), recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq, and a CS degree. However, the resume shows limited depth in production GenAI/LLM systems — no explicit RAG, vector database, or multi-agent framework experience, and no demonstrated cloud-platform AI architecture work. The 8+ years of AI-specific solution development required is not clearly substantiated; AI work appears recent and tooling-focused rather than customer-facing delivery at staff scale.
strengths: Senior IC with strong full-stack and TypeScript/Node.js depth
Recent MCP and agentic workflow tooling experience at re:cinq
Proven mentorship, workshops, and technical leadership track record
concerns: No demonstrated RAG, vector DB, or multi-agent framework experience
Lacks 8+ years specifically building production AI/ML systems
No clear customer-facing forward-deployed or discovery-lead experience

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering and mentorship track record
